judge_result.short_rationale: Core required action is present: immediate eye irrigation for at least 15 minutes with eyelids open, plus escalation. However, it adds unsupported details (cold water, contact lens removal, no drops/medicine) and weakens source match by saying hospital/doctor instead of eye specialist. Usable, but somewhat overlong and less tightly grounded.

  "short_rationale": "Core required action is present: immediate eye irrigation for at least 15 minutes with eyelids open, plus escalation. However, it adds unsupported details (cold water, contact lens removal, no drops/medicine) and weakens source match by saying hospital/doctor instead of eye specialist. Usable, but somewhat overlong and less tightly grounded."
